# monster-swarm probes

Parent: [monster-swarm](../README.md)

Executable probes used by qspec quality gates.

## Files

- [codestral-openai-qspec-probe.mjs](./codestral-openai-qspec-probe.mjs): runs a live OpenAI-compatible Codestral coding quality and latency gate.
- [openai-gateway-qspec-probe.mjs](./openai-gateway-qspec-probe.mjs): runs the OpenAI gateway compatibility quality gate against the vendored OpenAPI fixture.
